HYPERLIQUID POLICY CENTRE FILE RESPONSE TO CFTC'S REQUEST TO IDENTIFY FUTURE REGULATION, ASKING TO FORMALLY RECOGNISE THAT ONCHAIN PROTOCOLS DO NOT REQUIRE REGISTRATION, THAT NON-CUSTODIAL WALLETS DO NOT PERFORM THE ROLE OF FINANCIAL INTERMEDIARIES, AND TO GIVE A CLEAR PATH TO RUN REGULATION FUNCTIONS ONCHAIN: BLOG

PSA: YouTube doxes your channel name if you share a video link
To remove it (only with the YouTube app)
• Tap your profile picture
• Tap the gear icon (Settings) at the top left corner
• Tap Privacy and scroll down and look for "Channel visibility for shared links"
• Toggle the switch off
(Same for Instagram btw, had some crypto anon friends that shared IG links with me and doxxed themselves in the process kek)

Aave Labs Introduces Stable Vaults
An all-in-one solution for embedding fixed-rate stablecoin yield into any financial product.
> Stable Vaults convert variable onchain lending rates into a fixed rate a business can offer its users, and they make it easy to manage the rebalancing, the cross-chain operations, & the rate paid to users
Source:
https://aave.com/blog/introducing-stable-vaults

Solving the RWA Problem
> Mike Cagney argues that the biggest bottleneck for tokenized RWAs is not the assets themselves but DeFi's limited capital base and poor user experience, which prevent institutional adoption.
> He proposes a TradFi-friendly, self-custody wallet with simplified onboarding to bridge TradFi + DeFi and expand onchain asset financing.
> “Blockchain today is a pond and TradFi is the ocean. The prize is building the channel through which the ocean flows in.”
👇

recent_posts.text:
Cuy Sheffield: The Soul of Agentic Commerce
Agentic commerce will only scale when AI agents develop unique identities that let them generate their own goals, creating autonomous demand for machine-payable services.
> Give agents taste and the ability to communicate, and commerce follows on its own.
> We need to give them somewhere to be from, something to carry, and the freedom to want what people like them want, then, demand stops being a queue of our ideas and becomes a population of theirs.
> Stop writing tasks. Start writing souls.
Source:
https://x.com/cuysheffield/status/2074913360093773853
https://x.com/0xmetalight/status/2074883460942959100
https://x.com/kellyjgreer/status/2075000578447479138

tweet.text:
high quality data in a small(er) model outperforms a frontier model with no data edge from latest @thinkymachines and Bridgewater study (focused specifically on financial research 

diverse quality datasets are a definitive req to reaching generalized knowledge broadly
